mapper.sql: id, student_no, name, age, grade_level, class_name, gender, ethnicity, parental_education, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT s.student_no, s.name, s.age, s.gender, s.grade_level, s.class_name, p.gpa, p.grade_class, GREATEST(s.updated_at, COALESCE(p.updated_at, s.updated_at)) AS update_time FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_performance p ON p.student_id = s.id WHERE s.deleted = 0

SELECT s.student_no, s.name, s.age, s.gender, s.grade_level, s.class_name, p.gpa, p.grade_class, GREATEST(s.updated_at, COALESCE(p.updated_at, s.updated_at)) AS update_time FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_performance p ON p.student_id = s.id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.class_name = #{className}

SELECT s.student_no, s.name, s.age, s.gender, s.grade_level, s.class_name, p.gpa, p.grade_class, GREATEST(s.updated_at, COALESCE(p.updated_at, s.updated_at)) AS update_time FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_performance p ON p.student_id = s.id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_no = #{studentNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.class_name = #{className}
SELECT DISTINCT s.grade_level AS gradeLevel, s.class_name AS className FROM student s WHERE s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.grade_level ASC, CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(s.class_name, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED) ASC
SELECT MIN(p.gpa) FROM student_performance p INNER JOIN student s ON s.id = p.student_id WHERE s.deleted = 0
SELECT MAX(p.gpa) FROM student_performance p INNER JOIN student s ON s.id = p.student_id WHERE s.deleted = 0

SELECT s.student_no AS overview_student_no, s.name AS overview_name, s.age AS overview_age, s.gender AS overview_gender, s.grade_level AS overview_grade_level, s.class_name AS overview_class_name,
p.gpa AS overview_gpa, p.grade_class AS overview_grade_class,
GREATEST( s.updated_at, COALESCE(p.updated_at, s.updated_at) ) AS overview_update_time,
p.study_time_weekly AS detail_study_time_weekly, p.absences AS detail_absences, p.tutoring AS detail_tutoring, p.parental_support AS detail_parental_support, p.extracurricular AS detail_extracurricular, p.sports AS detail_sports, p.music AS detail_music, p.volunteering AS detail_volunteering, p.gpa AS detail_gpa, p.grade_class AS detail_grade_class,
CASE WHEN p.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS performance_available
FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_performance p ON p.student_id = s.id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_no = #{studentNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE student
name = #{name},
age = #{age},
grade_level = #{gradeLevel},
class_name = #{className},
gender = #{gender},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE deleted = 0 AND student_no = #{studentNo}

UPDATE student_performance p INNER JOIN student s ON s.id = p.student_id
p.gpa = #{gpa},
p.grade_class = #{gradeClass},
p.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_no = #{studentNo}
UPDATE student SET deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE deleted = 0 AND student_no = #{studentNo}
